{{Quote|<nowiki />''[…]'' I loathe inefficiency.|Trillot|<ref name="Cestus" />}}
'''Trillot''' was an [[X'Ting]] from [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]] who had been an employee of [[Cestus Cybernetics]] until he began his criminal ascent for the local [[Tenloss Syndicate/Legends|Tenloss Syndicate]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. During the [[Mission to Ord Cestus|Bio-Droid crisis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Trillot was selling information to the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], but unbeknownst to Kenobi, the X'Ting was also passing information to [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]]. After the mission on Ord Cestus—during which Trillot [[The Change|changed]] [[Gender/Legends|gender]] along with sex from male to female as part of her species' lifecycle—she was betrayed and [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by Ventress.<ref name="Cestus" />
